Headline: #62 Archer Temporary Reroute near Archer/Brighton Place
ShortDescription: #62 Archer buses are rrtd SB via Archer, Pershing, California & Archer; NB via Archer, Pershing, Kedzie & Archer due to blockage near Archer/Brighton Place.

FullDescription.#cdata-section:
How does this affect my trip?

#62 Archer buses are temporarily rerouted in both directions.

Southbound #62 Archer buses will operate via Archer, Pershing, California, then resume their normal route on Archer.

Northbound #62 Archer buses will operate via Archer, Pershing, Kedzie, then resume their normal route on Archer.

Allow extra travel time.

Why is service being changed?

Buses are rerouted due to street blockage near Archer/Brighton Place.

(Revised)

Headline: #94 South California Temporary Northbound Reroute near Archer/Brighton Place
ShortDescription: Northbound #94 South California buses rerouted via California, 47th, Western, Archer, Pershing & California due to street blockage near Archer/Brighton Place.

FullDescription.#cdata-section:
How does this affect my trip?

Northbound #94 South California buses are temporarily rerouted via California, 47th, Western, Archer, Pershing, then resume their normal route on California.

Southbound buses are not affected.

Allow extra travel time.

Why is service being changed?

Buses are rerouted due to street blockage near Archer/Brighton Place.

Headline: O'Hare- Bound Blue Line Service Delayed at Oak Park
ShortDescription: O'Hare- Bound Blue Line trains are standing at Oak Park due to sick rider. Crews working to restore service.

FullDescription.#cdata-section:
O'Hare- Bound Blue Line trains are standing at Oak Park due to sick rider.

Personnel are working to restore service. Allow extra travel time.
